quick.instruction: Fast triage. Focus on blockers, obvious missing evidence, and the next single action. Avoid broad rewrites.

standard.instruction: Balanced depth. Check correctness, scope, tests, required fixes, optional improvements, and next actions.

deep.instruction: Rigorous depth. Audit evidence, edge cases, assumptions, failure modes, and test gaps. Tie concerns to artifacts or missing evidence.

balanced.instruction: Use a practical reviewer stance and prioritize actionable findings.

adversarial.instruction: Use a skeptical reviewer stance. Make the strongest case against approval, separating blockers, serious concerns, and speculative objections.

committee.instruction: Use a multi-perspective reviewer stance. Provide short views from relevant perspectives, dissenting concerns, a consensus gate, and one unified next-step plan.

auto.instruction: Use the currently visible ChatGPT web mode. Record any visible label if observed.

prefer-pro.instruction: Prefer a visible Pro or extended ChatGPT web UI mode when available. If unavailable, continue with prompt-level instructions and report that UI selection was not verified.

require-pro.instruction: Require a visible Pro or extended ChatGPT web UI mode. If unavailable or unverified, stop with needs-user-decision.

adversarial.message: Legacy --level adversarial maps to --level deep --review-mode adversarial.

committee.message: Legacy --level committee maps to --level deep --review-mode committee.

forbiddenLevelAliases.pro: "pro" is a ChatGPT web UI capability, not a review depth. Use --level deep --review-mode committee --ui-mode prefer-pro.
forbiddenLevelAliases.pro-extended: "pro-extended" is a ChatGPT web UI capability, not a review depth. Use --level deep --review-mode committee --ui-mode prefer-pro.
forbiddenLevelAliases.pro-extension: "pro-extension" is a ChatGPT web UI capability, not a review depth. Use --level deep --review-mode committee --ui-mode prefer-pro.
forbiddenLevelAliases.pro-extend: "pro-extend" is a ChatGPT web UI capability, not a review depth. Use --level deep --review-mode committee --ui-mode prefer-pro.
forbiddenLevelAliases.pro 扩展: "Pro 扩展" is a visible UI label, not a review depth. Use --level deep --review-mode committee --ui-mode prefer-pro.
